What We Do

Our Services

Sahaj offers a complete range of interior design, construction, and civil services — all under one roof with 30+ years of expertise.

🏠

Interior Renovation

We bring your vision to life — from a single room makeover to complete home interior. Our design team works closely with you to understand your lifestyle, aesthetics, and budget, delivering spaces that are beautiful, functional, and lasting.

→ Living rooms, bedrooms & kitchens
→ False ceilings, lighting & flooring
→ Modular furniture & wardrobes
→ Hotels, restaurants, clinics & offices
🏗️

Building Construction

From ground-up construction to complete structural repairs, we handle it all. Our experienced team ensures that every build meets the highest standards of safety, quality, and durability — delivered on time and within budget.

→ Residential & commercial new builds
→ Structural repair & restoration
→ RCC work, plastering & brickwork
→ Painting & surface finishing
📐

Civil Contracting

Sahaj takes on large-scale civil contracting projects with precision and professionalism. From malls and multiplexes to corporate parks and hospitality complexes, we have the capability and experience to execute at any scale.

→ Mall & retail complex construction
→ Corporate offices & IT parks
→ Hotel & hospitality infrastructure
→ Multi-story residential buildings
💧

Waterproofing Solutions

Protect your property with our tested and trusted waterproofing solutions. We use industry-grade materials and proven techniques to seal every vulnerable surface — ensuring long-lasting protection against water ingress and seepage.

→ Terrace & roof waterproofing
→ Basement & underground sealing
→ Bathroom & wet area treatment
→ External wall & seepage repair
How We Work

01

Our Story

About Sahaj

Three decades of turning visions into reality — one project at a time.

Who We Are

Built on Trust.
Crafted with Care.

Sahaj was founded with one simple belief — every client deserves quality work, honest pricing, and timely delivery. What started as a small construction team has grown over 30 years into one of Mumbai's most trusted names in interior design and civil construction.

Led by Rakesh Bhola and Jaitik Bhola, the father-son duo brings together decades of on-ground experience with fresh, modern design thinking. Together, they have personally overseen 500+ projects — from luxury villas and corporate offices to retail outlets for global brands like Nike, Puma, and Adidas.
